scenario.name: ex_kamailio relay register
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:kamailio:5060 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:1000@kamailio>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:1000@kamailio> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:1000@sipp-uas:5070;transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 86400 Content-Length: 0
